contentBlocks.original:
मूले ब्रह्मा त्वचि विष्णुः शाखायां शंकर एव च ।
पत्रे पत्रे सर्व देवाः वासुदेवाय ते नमः ।।
contentBlocks.transliteration:
mūle brahmā tvaci viṣṇuḥ śākhāyāṃ śaṃkara eva ca .
patre patre sarva devāḥ vāsudevāya te namaḥ ..
contentBlocks.translation: Brahma is at the root, Vishnu is in the bark and Sankara is in the branches, all devas are in each and every leaf. Salutation to you O Vaasudeva.
contentBlocks.meanings: मूले (mūle) – at the root; ब्रह्मा (brahmā) – Brahma; त्वचि (tvaci) – in the bark; विष्णुः (viṣṇuḥ) – Vishnu; शाखायाम् (śākhāyām) – in the branches; शंकर (śaṃkara) – Shankara; एव (eva) – indeed; च (ca) – and; पत्रे (patre) – in each leaf; पत्रे (patre) – in each leaf; सर्व (sarva) – all; देवाः (devāḥ) – gods; वासुदेवाय (vāsudevāya) – to Vaasudeva; ते (te) – to you; नमः (namaḥ) – salutation;
